name: optimization_pack_v1
description: Search-first optimization pack (read-only). Adds the core quality, delivery, recommendation, and conversion context that an agent needs for no-GAQL Google Ads diagnosis. Export optional groups for RSA asset labels, landing pages, placements, and segmented breakdowns.

ad_group_ad.resource_name.description: Ad group ad stable identifier (resource name).

ad_group_criterion.resource_name.description: Ad group criterion stable identifier (resource name).

keyword.text.description: Keyword text (when the criterion is a keyword).

keyword.match_type.description: Keyword match type (when the criterion is a keyword).

segments.device.description: Device segment (DESKTOP, MOBILE, TABLET, CONNECTED_TV, OTHER).

segments.ad_network_type.description: Ad network type segment (for example SEARCH or CONTENT).

segments.conversion_action.description: Conversion action resource name segment (for breakdowns).

detail_placement_view.placement.description: Placement string (URL / app / YouTube channel/video), where available.

gaql_templates.base: SELECT customer.id, customer.resource_name, customer.descriptive_name, customer.currency_code, customer.time_zone, customer.optimization_score, customer.optimization_score_weight FROM customer

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.primary_status, campaign.primary_status_reasons, campaign.serving_status, campaign.advertising_channel_type, campaign.advertising_channel_sub_type, campaign.bidding_strategy_type, campaign.optimization_score, campaign.campaign_budget FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.start_date_time, campaign.end_date_time, campaign.serving_status, campaign.bidding_strategy_type, campaign.campaign_budget, campaign.manual_cpc.enhanced_cpc_enabled, campaign.network_settings.target_google_search, campaign.network_settings.target_search_network, campaign.network_settings.target_content_network, campaign.network_settings.target_partner_search_network, campaign.geo_target_type_setting.positive_geo_target_type FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign_budget.resource_name, campaign_budget.id, campaign_budget.name, campaign_budget.amount_micros, campaign_budget.delivery_method, campaign_budget.period, campaign_budget.type, campaign_budget.status FROM campaign_budget

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.average_cpc, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.search_impression_share, metrics.search_budget_lost_impression_share, metrics.search_rank_lost_impression_share, metrics.search_exact_match_impression_share, metrics.search_top_impression_share, metrics.search_absolute_top_impression_share FROM campaign WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, ad_group.status, ad_group.type, ad_group.primary_status, ad_group.primary_status_reasons, ad_group.cpc_bid_micros FROM ad_group WHERE ad_group.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.status, ad_group_ad.primary_status, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.type, ad_group_ad.ad.final_urls, ad_group_ad.ad_strength, ad_group_ad.policy_summary.approval_status, ad_group_ad.policy_summary.review_status, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part1, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part2, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part3, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description2, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.headlines, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.descriptions FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, ad_group_criterion.resource_name, ad_group_criterion.status, ad_group_criterion.primary_status, ad_group_criterion.primary_status_reasons, ad_group_criterion.system_serving_status, ad_group_criterion.keyword.text, ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM keyword_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, keyword_view.resource_name, ad_group_criterion.resource_name, ad_group_criterion.status, ad_group_criterion.primary_status, ad_group_criterion.primary_status_reasons, ad_group_criterion.system_serving_status, ad_group_criterion.keyword.text, ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type, ad_group_criterion.quality_info.quality_score, ad_group_criterion.quality_info.search_predicted_ctr, ad_group_criterion.quality_info.creative_quality_score, ad_group_criterion.quality_info.post_click_quality_score, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM keyword_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, segments.date, search_term_view.search_term, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM search_term_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, conversion_action.resource_name, conversion_action.name, conversion_action.status, conversion_action.category, conversion_action.type, conversion_action.origin, conversion_action.primary_for_goal, conversion_action.include_in_conversions_metric, conversion_action.phone_call_duration_seconds FROM conversion_action WHERE conversion_action.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, recommendation.resource_name, recommendation.type, recommendation.dismissed, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, campaign.name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name FROM recommendation

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, ad_group_ad_asset_view.field_type, ad_group_ad_asset_view.performance_label, asset.resource_name, asset.type, asset.text_asset.text FROM ad_group_ad_asset_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, segments.date, landing_page_view.unexpanded_final_url, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM landing_page_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, segments.date, detail_placement_view.placement, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM detail_placement_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.device, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.ad_network_type, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, segments.hour, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM campaign WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.conversion_action, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'
